title: Inverse Design of Compact and Wideband Inverted Doherty Power Amplifiers Using Deep Learning
abstract: arXiv:2606.27002v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: This paper presents a deep learning-assisted methodology for the inverse synthesis of a compact, wideband inverted Doherty power amplifier (PA). Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and genetic algorithms (GAs) are jointly employed to generate pixelated Doherty combiner networks that integrate load modulation, impedance matching, power combining, and phase compensation into a single structure. As a proof of concept, we design and fabricate a GaN HEMT Doherty PA with a pixelated output combiner. The prototype achieves a measured peak drain efficiency of 51%-63% and a 6-dB back-off efficiency of 48%-54% over 1.9-2.5 GHz. Within the same frequency range, the measured output power is 44+/-0.3 dBm. Furthermore, with digital predistortion (DPD) applied, the prototype circuit demonstrates an adjacent channel leakage ratio (ACLR) better than -53.2 dBc.

Title: Inverse Design of Compact and Wideband Inverted Doherty Power Amplifiers Using Deep Learning
Abstract: arXiv:2606.27002v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: This paper presents a deep learning-assisted methodology for the inverse synthesis of a compact, wideband inverted Doherty power amplifier (PA). Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and genetic algorithms (GAs) are jointly employed to generate pixelated Doherty combiner networks that integrate load modulation, impedance matching, power combining, and phase compensation into a single structure. As a proof of concept, we design and fabricate a GaN HEMT Doherty PA with a pixelated output combiner. The prototype achieves a measured peak drain efficiency of 51%-63% and a 6-dB back-off efficiency of 48%-54% over 1.9-2.5 GHz. Within the same frequency range, the measured output power is 44+/-0.3 dBm. translated_title: 基于深度学习的紧凑宽带倒置Doherty功率放大器逆向设计
translated_abstract: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的紧凑宽带倒置Doherty功率放大器（PA）逆向综合方法。该方法联合使用卷积神经网络（CNN）和遗传算法（GA），生成像素化Doherty合成网络，将负载调制、阻抗匹配、功率合成和相位补偿集成到单一结构中。作为概念验证，我们设计并制造了一款采用像素化输出合成器的GaN HEMT Doherty PA。该原型在1.9-2.5 GHz频率范围内测得峰值漏极效率为51%-63%，6 dB回退效率为48%-54%。在同一频段内，测得输出功率为44+/-0.3 dBm。此外，应用数字预失真（DPD）后，原型电路展示了优于-53.2 dBc的邻信道泄漏比（ACLR）。
tldr: 本文提出了一种利用深度学习和遗传算法联合优化，将多个功能集成到单一像素化结构中的逆向设计方法，成功实现了紧凑宽带倒置Doherty功率放大器，在1.9-2.5 GHz范围内同时实现了高效率和良好线性度。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes an inverse design methodology that combines deep learning and genetic algorithms to integrate multiple functions into a single pixelated structure, successfully realizing a compact and wideband inverted Doherty power amplifier with high efficiency and good linearity over 1.9-2.5 GHz.
